name: Venus rose
description:
Deep cleansing foam with rose scent that gently removes impurities, excess oil, and makeup while leaving the skin soft and refreshed.

Its delicate formula helps maintain the skin’s natural balance while providing a soothing cleansing experience suitable for daily skincare routines.
ingredients: Water, Glycerin, Rose Extract, Aloe Vera Extract, Panthenol, Sodium Cocoyl Glycinate, Citric Acid, Fragrance.
howToUse: Apply a small amount onto damp skin and gently massage in circular motions until foam forms. Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water and continue with your skincare routine.

name: Venus clear
description:
Deep cleansing foam with milky texture that gently removes impurities while leaving the skin soft and hydrated.

Its creamy texture helps maintain moisture balance and provides a smooth and comfortable cleansing experience for everyday use.
ingredients: Water, Glycerin, Milk Protein Extract, Chamomile Extract, Panthenol, Sodium Cocoyl Isethionate, Lactic Acid, Fragrance.
howToUse: Massage onto wet skin in gentle circular motions. Rinse thoroughly and pat dry before applying the next skincare step.

name: Venus mint
description:
Deep cleansing foam with refreshing mint aroma that purifies the skin and removes daily buildup.

Its cooling sensation leaves the face feeling revitalized and refreshed, making it perfect for energizing morning routines.
ingredients: Water, Glycerin, Mint Leaf Extract, Tea Tree Oil, Aloe Vera Extract, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Panthenol, Fragrance.
howToUse: Work a small amount into foam with wet hands, massage onto damp skin, then rinse thoroughly with warm water.

name: Me like Volumizing Lip Gloss
description:
A volumizing lip gloss that enhances the natural shape of your lips while adding brilliant shine.

Its lightweight formula provides a glossy finish without stickiness, leaving lips smooth, hydrated, and comfortable.
ingredients: Hydrogenated Polyisobutene, Jojoba Oil, Shea Butter, Vitamin E, Silica, Synthetic Wax, Flavor, Pigments.
howToUse: Apply directly onto lips using the applicator or layer over lipstick to enhance shine and volume.

name: Kiss catcher lipstick
description:
A smooth liquid lipstick with a creamy finish that glides effortlessly onto the lips.

The rich pigment delivers long-lasting color while maintaining a comfortable, lightweight feel throughout the day.
ingredients: Isododecane, Dimethicone, Beeswax, Vitamin E, Castor Oil, Kaolin, Synthetic Pigments, Fragrance.
howToUse: Apply evenly to clean lips starting from the center and blending outward for precise coverage.

name: Playinn Makeup Brush
description:
A double-sided synthetic makeup brush designed for precise application on eyes and brows.

Its soft yet durable bristles ensure smooth blending and accurate definition for professional-looking makeup results.
ingredients: Synthetic Fiber Bristles, Aluminum Ferrule, Wooden Handle, Protective Coating.
howToUse: Use the angled side for shaping brows and the softer side for blending eyeshadow. Clean regularly with mild soap or brush cleanser.

name: Eye shadow palette
description:
A versatile eyeshadow palette featuring a selection of vibrant and neutral shades.

Highly pigmented formulas blend effortlessly, allowing you to create both subtle everyday looks and bold evening styles.
ingredients: Talc, Mica, Silica, Dimethicone, Magnesium Stearate, Synthetic Fluorphlogopite, Pigments, Vitamin E.
howToUse: Apply lighter shades across the eyelid as a base, deepen the crease with medium tones, and use darker shades to add depth and definition.

name: Me like Volumizing Lip Gloss
description:
A volumizing lip gloss that enhances the natural shape of your lips while adding brilliant shine.

Its lightweight formula provides a glossy finish without stickiness, leaving lips smooth, hydrated, and comfortable.
ingredients: Hydrogenated Polyisobutene, Jojoba Oil, Shea Butter, Vitamin E, Silica, Synthetic Wax, Flavor, Pigments.
howToUse: Apply directly onto lips using the applicator or layer over lipstick to enhance shine and volume.

name: Sleeks Cream Lip Paint
description: A beautiful lip product presented in packaging resembling a test tube as a nod to the company’s passion for science. Vitamin E and rich emollients moisturize your lips while a long lasting formula ensures longevity. Creamy texture is frost and glitter free, perfect for colour with a glossy yet flat texture.
ingredients: Hydrogenated Polyisobutene, Jojoba Seed Oil, Shea Butter, Tocopheryl Acetate, Silica, Synthetic Wax, Flavor, Colorants.
howToUse: Apply with a dedicated applicator directly from the packaging.
